channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] What is Good? Extracting and Testing Implicit Theories of Literary Quality from LLM Reasoning Traces
item.description: What is Good? Extracting and Testing Implicit Theories of Literary Quality from LLM Reasoning Traces

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Knowledge Injection Exists in MoE? Exploring Expert-Aware Contrast Decoding in MoE for Mitigating LLMs'Hallucinations
item.description: Knowledge Injection Exists in MoE? Exploring Expert-Aware Contrast Decoding in MoE for Mitigating LLMs'Hallucinations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Is MoE Routing a Huffman Code? Discovering the Frequency-Diversity Law in Chain-of-Thought
item.description: Is MoE Routing a Huffman Code? Discovering the Frequency-Diversity Law in Chain-of-Thought

item.description: Break Through the Compression Bottleneck: From Theory to Practice

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Making Open-Source Text LLM Watermarks Durable Against Merging
item.description: Making Open-Source Text LLM Watermarks Durable Against Merging

item.description: Routing Subspaces: Auditing Evaluation-to-Deployment Mismatch in Fine-Tuned Language Models

item.description: Preference Tuning as Spectral Update Reorganization

item.description: Answer-then-Edit: Reasoning Skeleton Editing for Anti-Distillation with Preserved Utility

item.description: Belief Propagation in LLM World Models: Measuring Strategic Information Bias with Prediction Markets

item.description: SCoPE: Shift-Aware Speaker-Conditioned Priors for Emotion Recognition in Conversations

item.description: Distinguishing Artificial from Authentic: Evaluating LLMs for Detecting LLM-Generated Content

item.description: thaulab@EEUCA 2026: Who Said What to Whom? A Targeting-Aware Neural-Symbolic Pipeline for Gaming Toxicity Detection

item.description: Domyn-Small: A European 10B Reasoning Language Model

item.description: The Storyteller in the Model: Narrative Pattern Inheritance, Escalation Dynamics, and Alignment Governance in LLMs

item.description: ShriNep@EEUCA 2026: RAKSHAK - Multi-Task DeBERTa with Rationale Distillation and Jigsaw-Augmented Training for Toxic Intent Classification

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Semantic Field Theory: Historical Origin, Higher-Order Interaction, and Stabilized Semantic Inference
item.description: Semantic Field Theory: Historical Origin, Higher-Order Interaction, and Stabilized Semantic Inference

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Knowledge-Injection Framework for Zero-Shot Adaptation of LLMs to Delirium Prediction
item.description: A Knowledge-Injection Framework for Zero-Shot Adaptation of LLMs to Delirium Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Response drift across frontier large language models
item.description: Response drift across frontier large language models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RE-AD: Real-Time Requirement Adherence for Data Labeling
item.description: RE-AD: Real-Time Requirement Adherence for Data Labeling

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DataPrep-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs as Training Data Preparators
item.description: DataPrep-Bench introduces the first unified benchmark for evaluating LLM-driven data preparation capabilities including data construction and quality evaluation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PhantomFill: When the Form Demands an Answer, Language Models Invent One
item.description: Required form fields cause language models to hallucinate answers instead of admitting insufficient information.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Active Ingredient in Muon's Grokking
item.description: Muon optimizer reaches grokking threshold faster than AdamW due to orthogonalization via Newton-Schulz iteration rather than spectral-norm constraints.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Scaling Closed-Loop Feature Channel Configuration with LLMs
item.description: LLMs optimize neural network channel widths at scale, achieving better accuracy and parameter efficiency on CIFAR-100.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Multimodal CoLRAG-TF: Triple-Filtered Retrieval for Complex PDFs
item.description: Multimodal CoLRAG-TF fuses text embeddings, keyword matching, knowledge-graph triples, and image similarity to improve retrieval-augmented generation for complex PDFs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Adaptive Depth in Looped Transformers: Diagnosing Learned Halting Gates and Trajectory Readouts
item.description: Study of looped Transformers shows adaptive depth performance limited by trajectory formation during training rather than halting gate expressivity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Generative Bayesian Filtering for State Estimation
item.description: Proposed Generative Bayesian Filtering uses conditional VAEs to improve state estimation for nonlinear dynamic systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Do Active SAE Feature Planes Carry More Holonomy? A Preregistered Reversal in Gemma
item.description: Study finds active SAE feature planes in Gemma 2 carry less holonomy than mixed-feature controls, falsifying the prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Uncertainty-Aware Trust Estimation for Multi-LLM Systems via Structured Expert Judgement
item.description: Uncertainty-Aware Trust Estimation for Multi-LLM Systems via Structured Expert Judgement

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CLOE: Christoffel Loss Autoencoder for Anomaly Detection
item.description: CLOE: Christoffel Loss Autoencoder for Anomaly Detection

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: Stop Reactively Patching Your Model Every Time and Start Proactive Test-Driven AI Development
item.description: Position: Stop Reactively Patching Your Model Every Time and Start Proactive Test-Driven AI Development

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Grounding Investor Views: Neural Predicates in the Black-Litterman Model
item.description: Grounding Investor Views: Neural Predicates in the Black-Litterman Model

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Graph Neural Network approach to zero-shot Digital Twins
item.description: A Graph Neural Network approach to zero-shot Digital Twins

item.description: ReliableTableQA:How Much Supervision Does Reliability Annotation Need?

item.description: Codec-Gauge: Learning Compression-Friendly Gauges for Transformer KV Caches
